query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dvao: dynamic variance-adaptive advantage optimization for multi-rewar" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for the "Dynamic Variance-adaptive" and "Multi-reward" exploration mechanisms central to the user's question, providing the canonical prior work on using ensemble errors and value bonuses for directed exploration in reinforcement learning. Additionally, it addresses the "Multi-reward" aspect by explicitly comparing against and improving upon existing reward bonus approaches (RND, ACB) within the same algorithmic domain.
